title: Fine Detail Paint Brushes Set for Art, 10PCS Miniature Paint Brush with Triangular Handles. Small Paint Brushes for Oil, Acrylic Painting, Watercolour, Model, Drawing, Perfect for Artist and Beginner
features: ☘️ VARIOUS acrylic paint brushes SIZES - We have 10 different brushes, each brush pen is made of high-grade nylon and high-quality wood barrel, these brushes can be more suitable for Various scenes.
☘️ MULTIPURPOSE paint brush set - Our brush pen is suitable for scenes such as paper, murals, rock paintings, hand-made models, etc., and can make you enjoy in various scenes.
☘️ PREMIUM QUALITY watercolour brushes - We use high quality, elastic, soft, highly absorbent, neat, without bifurcated bristles, not easy to oxidize and shed hair, even novices can use it at will
☘️ PORTABLE oil paint set - Our brush pen does not exceed 250mm in length to make it easy to carry when painting outdoors

☘️ Paint brushes art - The art brushes set with aluminium ferrules for preventing any rust, easy to clean for lasting performance. Designed for use with watercolours, oils, temperas and acrylics and also great for gift-giving.
description: Product Description Our detail brush can provide a comfortable experience for your painting and DIY. Brush pen cleaning steps 1. Erase excess paint 2. Wash with water 3. Use your fingers to gently brush the bristles 4. Wait for the brush to be dry PENCILMARCH is committed to providing artists with the highest quality products and services. Excellent brushes are your best friends when painting. After repeated use, it is still soft and as new. Wide range of application, so you can play your imagination anytime, anywhere.
